message:
test(harness): add pthread_cond regression guards and regenerate conformance artifacts

- conformance_matrix_test: add canonical_matrix_keeps_pthread_cond_cases_covered
  test that asserts all 6 pthread_cond symbols (broadcast, destroy, init,
  signal, timedwait, wait) are present with >= 48 rows, all passing, none
  falling back to unsupported output
- errno_edge_report_test: add canonical_errno_edge_report_keeps_pthread_cond_rows_out_of_unsupported
  test that verifies pthread_cond errno-edge rows pass, are not classified
  as unsupported_function, and point at concrete conformance trace IDs
- Regenerate conformance_matrix.v1.json and errno_edge_report.v1.json
  with updated test results reflecting current implementation coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
